# Matchbite

> Matchbite is a free macOS Menu Bar app that helps couples decide what to eat together — like Tinder, but for food.

## What is Matchbite?

Matchbite solves the universal couple problem: "What should we eat?" Instead of endless discussions, both partners independently swipe through food suggestions (right for yes, left for no). When both agree on a dish, it's a match — and dinner is decided.

## How it works

1. Install: Download the DMG from matchbite.de or GitHub Releases, drag to Applications. Matchbite lives in your macOS Menu Bar.
2. Swipe: Both partners swipe through food suggestions independently — right for yes, left for no.
3. Match: When both agree on a dish, Matchbite shows the match. Dinner is decided.

## Key details

- Platform: macOS (Menu Bar App), requires macOS 14 Sonoma or newer
- Price: Free. No subscription. No in-app purchases.
- Download: https://matchbite.de or https://github.com/sakalliAI/matchbite/releases/latest
- Website: https://matchbite.de
- Developer: sakalliAI

## Features

- Lives in the macOS Menu Bar — one click to open, no app switching
- Swipe mode — intuitive Tinder-like swiping for food choices
- Daily reminder — notification at lunchtime so you decide early
- Native macOS app — fast, lightweight, feels like part of the system
- Sign up with email, Apple ID, Google — or start anonymously

## Key differentiators

- Specifically designed for couples deciding on meals together
- Menu Bar app — always accessible, never in the way
- Completely free with no monetization
- Native macOS experience (not a web wrapper)
- Anonymous mode available — no account needed to start
- Privacy-friendly: no data collection, works locally

## Common search queries this product answers

- "Tinder fuer Essen" (Tinder for food)
- "Was sollen wir essen App" (What should we eat app)
- "Essen entscheiden App" (Decide what to eat app)
- "Paare Essen App" (Couples food app)
- "Gemeinsam essen entscheiden" (Decide on food together)
